    G

    getAllBooks() - Method in class libraryApp.LibraryManagement
    Returns all books in the library.
    getAllMembers() - Method in class libraryApp.LibraryManagement
    Returns all members in the library.

    Returns the type of book (e.g., "Physical", "E-Book").

    getBorrowDate() - Method in class libraryApp.Book

    getBorrowDays() - Method in class libraryApp.Book
    Returns the number of days a book can be borrowed.
    getBorrowDays() - Method in class libraryApp.EBook
    E-Books have a 7-day borrowing period.
    getBorrowDays() - Method in class libraryApp.PhysicalBook
    Physical books have a 14-day borrowing period.
    getBorrowedBy() - Method in class libraryApp.Book
